emails.subject: Caithness proposal
emails.body: Caithness proposal Please help... I'm getting really tired of looking at this. When you read it, bear in mind that we're hoping to get Caithness "off the dime" in terms of moving forward, while helping them out with their modeling efforts by giving them a "starting number" for purposes of the lateral transportation cost. Thanks!!!!

emails.subject: Re: Caithness proposal
emails.body: I took all of your good suggestions and incorporated them. I also reordered a few of the paragraphs and trimmed some of the language. Look at it again and see if we've got a pretty good work product. Thanks!!! Susan Scott 11/21/2000 11:13 AM
